title: Give Me Women, Wine, And Snuff
content:
Give me women, wine, and snuff
    Until I cry out "hold, enough!"
    You may do so sans objection
    Till the day of resurrection;
    For bless my beard they aye shall be
    My beloved Trinity.
meaning:
John Keats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Give Me Women, Wine, And Snuff"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
